title.line1: Level up learning beyond the classroom
title.line2: with activities that build real skills

hero.desc: This platform helps students explore and join activities to develop academic, life, and professional skills. Each activity contributes skill points and becomes an important part of the year promotion requirements.

3.title: Earn EXP & skill levels
3.desc: EXP is recorded automatically and skill levels update

4.title: Check promotion requirements
4.desc: Ensure you meet the criteria for year promotion

categories.title: Activity categories

benefits.title: Benefits for students and the university

items.1: • Track progress via EXP and skill levels
items.2: • Build an activity profile/badges for career readiness
items.3: • Choose a personalized skill development path

items.1: • Monitor extracurricular learning in real time
items.2: • Design activities aligned with assessment criteria
items.3: • Use participation data for analysis and planning

items.2: • Concrete competency development with measurable outcomes
items.3: • Expand partnerships with industry and organizations

cta.title: Ready to build your future skills on your own terms?
